items.title: DaRon Holmes II rocks the rim with powerful dunk
items.author: ESPN
items.body_excerpt: DaRon Holmes II rocks the rim with powerful dunk ESPN

items.title: In December 2022, Trevon Brazile tore his ACL. He's with Denver Nuggets now, where he will compete with power forward DaRon Holmes II, a 2024 first round pick who is still trying to bounce back from an Achilles tear in his rookie summer league
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: In December 2022, Trevon Brazile tore his ACL. He's with Denver Nuggets now, where he will compete with power forward DaRon Holmes II, a 2024 first round pick who is still trying to bounce back from an Achilles tear in his rookie summer league
